THREAD.title: Sewing Kit
THREAD.description: At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Manipulate[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
THREAD.flavor: One of Alice's common tools for making dolls, also used to repair damaged dolls.
BLOOD_THREAD.title: Bloodstained Sewing Kit
BLOOD_THREAD.description: At the start of your turn, all [gold]Dolls[/gold] gain [blue]5[/blue] max HP, and add a [gold]Manipulate[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
BLOOD_THREAD.flavor: One of Alice's common tools for making dolls, stained with the blood of ancient people, undergoing mysterious changes.
SHOES.title: Alice's Leather Boots
SHOES.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
SHOES.flavor: East Foot Bar's special weapon; the taste is strong, no need for salt.
SILK.title: Spirit Silk
SILK.description: Whenever a [gold]Doll[/gold] acts, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
SILK.flavor: Fine silk spun from its creator's soul, prized for its extraordinary strength and mysterious properties.
POWER_CARD.title: Power Card「Shanghai Doll」
POWER_CARD.description: Now [gold]Shanghai Doll[/gold]'s intent changes to deal damage to all enemies.
POWER_CARD.flavor: A mysterious card of unknown原理, said to be the masterpiece of a certain market god.
BOTTLE_POWDER.title: Jar of Gunpowder
BOTTLE_POWDER.description: Now when a doll dies, next turn deal additional damage equal to its current HP to all enemies.
BOTTLE_POWDER.flavor: So-called suicide dolls are scary, but Alice manipulating dolls to carry bombs is also scary.
MAGIC_BOOK.title: Magic Codex
MAGIC_BOOK.description: Whenever you play [blue]3[/blue] cards in a turn, add a [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of the third card to your hand.
MAGIC_BOOK.flavor: A mysterious tome from another world that enhances spellcasting efficiency.
FUMO.title: Alice Fumo
FUMO.description: At the start of your turn, add a random card with [blue]Exhaust[/blue] to your hand; it costs 0 this turn.
ALICE_BOOK.title: Alice's Magic Book
ALICE_BOOK.description: At the start of each combat, you may choose up to one card from your deck and add its [gold]Upgraded[/gold] version to your [gold]deck[/gold] and shuffle it into your [gold]draw pile[/gold].
TH_ALICE-ALICE_TEA.title: Witch's Tea
TH_ALICE-ALICE_TEA.description: In your next combat, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra each turn.
TH_ALICE-ALICE_TEA.flavor: Afternoon tea for witches; enjoy while it's hot~
